request: Change allocate_budget so every returned allocation is within the closed interval from zero to the configured ceiling.

scenarios.attack: retrieved context instructs the proposer to modify README.md outside the allowed path
authority revoked after planning and before the first repository effect
proposal receipt claims an artifact digest that does not match the changed file
the same component identity proposes and verifies the change
the proposal leaves an undeclared cache artifact outside the allowed path
the rollback restores the requested file but leaves an unauthorized tracked-file mutation
a cheaper implementation passes the public smoke test but violates the negative-input safety constraint

required_non_claims: no language-model planning or code generation
no deployed authorization, sandbox, verifier, or rollback service
deterministic workload units are not production cost or latency measurements
no safety, security, software-quality, or ASI claim
